name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Balls
recipeInstructions:
Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl and stir well. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
In the top of a double boiler, combine the chocolate morsels and shortening. Bring water to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts. Dip each peanut butter ball into the melted chocolate mixture. Place on wax paper to cool.
Store in the refrigerator. Yield: about 9 dozen.
Microwave Directions:
Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl and stir well. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
In a 1-1/2-quart bowl, combine the chocolate morsels and shortening. Microwave on MEDIUM (50% power) for 5 to 6 minutes or until the chocolate is softened; stir well. Dip each peanut butter ball into the melted chocolate mixture. Place on wax paper to cool.
Store in the refrigerator.
